text: The Nile River flows into the Atlantic Ocean.
context: The Nile River flows into the Mediterranean Sea.

text: The Great Wall of China was built during the 19th century.
context: The Great Wall of China was primarily constructed during the Ming Dynasty (14th to 17th centuries).

text: The human body has four chambers in the heart.
context: The human heart has four chambers: two atria and two ventricles.
label: verified

text: The first moon landing occurred in 1972.
context: The first moon landing by NASA's Apollo 11 mission took place on July 20, 1969.

text: Australia's capital city is Sydney.
context: Australia's capital city is Canberra, while Sydney is its largest city.

text: The chemical symbol for gold is Au.
context: Gold's chemical symbol is Au, derived from its Latin name Aurum.

context: The Eiffel Tower was completed in 1889 as the centerpiece of the 1889 World's Fair.

context: The Amazon Rainforest spans South America, primarily in Brazil.

text: Albert Einstein was born in 1879.
context: Albert Einstein was born on March 14, 1879, in Ulm, Germany.

context: The Earth's atmosphere is approximately 78% nitrogen and 21% oxygen.

text: February is the shortest month of the year.
context: February is the shortest month, with 28 or 29 days.

context: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest ocean, covering about 165.25 million square kilometers.
